creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Sorry... I just follow the porter's handbook, and it says " If the submitter is also maintaining the port, be sure to put [MAINTAINER] at the beginning of the Summary line." [1]

Maybe it needs some updating?

Anyways, thanks for working on this and telling me about the flag.

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/port-upgrading.html
